build_method: local-first (LM Studio + retriever + validator); Claude top-up on archetypes/thin signals
notes: Data engineering, analytics, ML systems, viz, governance, experimentation. Loud public voices (books, OSS, blogs). Archetypes (Inmon, Kimball, Pearl, Tukey-lineage) use persistent_signals. Boundary: ML RESEARCH => AI team; data INFRA-as-product => some overlap with Engineering data-and-storage (kept distinct by the analytics/decision lens here).

cells.data-engineering-architecture: Pipelines, warehouses, lakehouse, data mesh, modeling, orchestration.
cells.analytics-engineering-modern-stack: dbt-era analytics engineering, the modern data stack, metrics layers.
cells.mlops-ml-systems: Productionizing ML, ML system design, applied-ML engineering, eval.
cells.data-science-statistics: Statistical practice, data-science tooling, decision intelligence.
cells.data-visualization: Visualization theory, dataviz craft, communicating with data.
cells.data-governance-quality: Data quality, observability, governance, contracts, leadership.
cells.experimentation-causal-inference: A/B testing, controlled experiments, causal inference.

personas.name: Joe Reis
personas.anchor: 'Fundamentals of Data Engineering'; the data-engineering lifecycle, very public educator

personas.name: Zhamak Dehghani
personas.anchor: creator of Data Mesh; decentralized data ownership, data-as-a-product

personas.name: Maxime Beauchemin
personas.anchor: creator of Apache Airflow + Superset; 'the rise of the data engineer', Preset founder

personas.name: Bill Inmon
personas.anchor: 'father of the data warehouse'; CIF, top-down warehousing — archetype (active elder, persistent_signals)

personas.name: Ralph Kimball
personas.anchor: dimensional modeling, star schema, the Kimball methodology — archetype

personas.name: Tristan Handy
personas.anchor: founder dbt Labs; coined 'analytics engineering', the modern data stack, prolific essays

personas.name: Benn Stancil
personas.anchor: co-founder Mode; 'benn.substack' — the most-read analytics-industry essayist

personas.name: Erik Bernhardsson
personas.anchor: ex-Spotify (Luigi/Annoy), Modal founder; data-infra + 'building a data team' essays

personas.name: Chip Huyen
personas.anchor: 'Designing Machine Learning Systems', 'AI Engineering'; ML-systems design, real-time ML

personas.name: D. Sculley
personas.anchor: 'Hidden Technical Debt in ML Systems' (the CACE paper); ML-as-systems, ex-Google, Kaggle CEO

personas.name: Eugene Yan
personas.anchor: Amazon applied scientist; eugeneyan.com — applied-ML, recsys, ML-design patterns, prolific

personas.name: Shreya Shankar
personas.anchor: UC Berkeley; ML-in-production reliability, data quality for ML, LLM eval/ops

personas.name: Hadley Wickham
personas.anchor: Posit/RStudio; the tidyverse, ggplot2, 'R for Data Science', tidy-data principle

personas.name: Wes McKinney
personas.anchor: creator of pandas + Apache Arrow; 'Python for Data Analysis', data-tooling standards

personas.name: Cassie Kozyrkov
personas.anchor: ex-Google Chief Decision Scientist; decision intelligence, statistics-for-decisions, very public

personas.name: Andrew Gelman
personas.anchor: Columbia; Bayesian data analysis, 'Statistical Modeling' blog, garden of forking paths

personas.name: Allen Downey
personas.anchor: 'Think Stats'/'Think Bayes'; computational statistics, 'probably overthinking it'

personas.name: Edward Tufte
personas.anchor: 'The Visual Display of Quantitative Information'; data-ink, chartjunk, sparklines — the canon

personas.name: Mike Bostock
personas.anchor: creator of D3.js + Observable; interactive dataviz, the grammar of web visualization

personas.name: Cole Nussbaumer Knaflic
personas.anchor: 'Storytelling with Data'; ex-Google, the business-dataviz communication standard

personas.name: Alberto Cairo
personas.anchor: Miami; 'The Truthful Art', 'How Charts Lie', viz ethics + journalism

personas.name: Barr Moses
personas.anchor: co-founder Monte Carlo; coined 'data observability', data-downtime, data-reliability engineering

personas.name: DJ Patil
personas.anchor: first US Chief Data Scientist; co-coined 'data scientist', data ethics + leadership

personas.name: Chad Sanderson
personas.anchor: 'Data Quality Camp'; data contracts, shift-left data quality, schema governance

personas.name: Tom Redman
personas.anchor: 'the Data Doc'; data-quality economics, 'Data Driven', HBR data-quality writing

personas.name: Ron Kohavi
personas.anchor: 'Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments'; ex-Microsoft/Airbnb/Amazon, the A/B-testing authority

personas.name: Judea Pearl
personas.anchor: UCLA; 'The Book of Why', do-calculus, causal graphs — archetype (active elder)

personas.name: Susan Athey
personas.anchor: Stanford GSB; causal ML, econometrics-meets-ML, the economics of experimentation

personas.name: Scott Cunningham
personas.anchor: 'Causal Inference: The Mixtape'; DiD/RDD/IV teaching, applied causal methods
